title: Remove unused assignments
description: This rule checks for variable assignments that are not used later in the code. Unused assignments can make the code harder to understand and maintain.

noncompliant.code:
x = 5
# code below never uses x
print(y)
noncompliant.description: Variable 'x' is assigned a value but never used.

compliant.description: Variable 'x' is assigned a value and used later.

why_is_this_an_issue: Unused assignments can make the code harder to understand and maintain.
